LanguageData.FB_FleshGeneArchiveInvalidGene: That gene pattern cannot be archived.
LanguageData.FB_FleshGeneArchiveFull: The genome archive has no free capacity.
LanguageData.FB_ForgetGenepackDesc: Erase this stored genepack. It will not be ejected or recovered.
LanguageData.FB_ConfirmForgetGenepack: Erase {0}? This will permanently delete the stored genepack.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageSelectDonorDesc: Choose a living donor pawn with genes. The cocoon slowly copies one to three random genes into the archive, then releases the donor after extraction.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageNoArchiveSpace: No genome archive with free capacity is available.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageGenesRegrowing: This donor's xenogerm is still regrowing.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageReleaseDonorDesc: Spit out the contained donor and cancel the current extraction.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageDevFinishExtractionDesc: Immediately complete this cocoon's current gene extraction.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverRecombineDesc: Choose archived genepacks to weave into an internal flesh xenogerm for cocoon integration.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverBusyRecombining: The reweaver is already creating a flesh xenogerm.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverOperationFailed: The flesh xenogerm weaving procedure failed.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageExtractGenesDesc: Extract one or two genes from a humanlike corpse, store them inside the chromophage as a genepack, and consume the remains.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageUnloadGenesDesc: Unload stored genepacks into a selected genome archive.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageInvalidCaster: Only a chromophage can perform this gene work.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageStorageFull: The chromophage has no free internal gene storage.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageCorpseExhausted: This corpse has already been stripped of useful genetic traces.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageNoCorpseGenes: No usable gene traces remain in this corpse.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageCannotReachCorpse: The chromophage cannot reach that corpse.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageNoStoredGenes: The chromophage is not carrying any genepacks.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageCannotReachArchive: The chromophage cannot reach that archive.
LanguageData.FB_ChromophageUnloadedGenes: Chromophage unloaded gene traces into the genome archive: {0}.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCreateXenogermDesc: Choose archived genes and weave them into one internal flesh xenogerm. The reweaver works on the full pattern under a single timer.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCancelXenogermDesc: Cancel the current flesh xenogerm. Already spent hemogel will not be refunded.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverDevFinishXenogermDesc: Immediately finish the gene reweaver's current flesh xenogerm preparation.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverBusyCreating: The reweaver is already creating a flesh xenogerm.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverQueuedXenogerm: Queued {0} genes for a flesh xenogerm.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverPreparedReady: {0} is ready inside the gene reweaver. Genes prepared: {1}.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverPreparedAlready: A prepared flesh xenogerm is already stored inside.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCallPawnDesc: Choose a controllable pawn to enter a temporary gene cocoon and integrate the prepared flesh xenogerm.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverDissolvePreparedDesc: Dissolve the prepared flesh xenogerm stored inside this reweaver. Spent hemogel will not be refunded.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverInvalidIntegrationPawn: This pawn cannot integrate the prepared xenogerm.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverDifferentMap: The pawn must be on the same map.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverNoCocoonCell: No reachable cell for a gene cocoon.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCocoonStarted: {PAWN_nameDef} enters a gene cocoon to integrate {XENOGERM}.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCocoonComplete: {PAWN_nameDef} emerged from the gene cocoon with {XENOGERM} integrated.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCocoonDied: {0} died in the ruptured gene cocoon.
